meta.subject: Home Economics
meta.philosophy: Quality, Life- long education for all which is accessible inclusive and relevant to individual, national and global needs and value systems.
meta.competence_learning: Demonstrate skills in baking and steaming. Demonstrate skills and knowledge in making improvised kitchen utensils. Demonstrate skills and knowledge in decorating rooms Demonstrate skills in laundering white cottons. Demonstrate skills and knowledge on care of the skin Demonstrate skills in making a homemade sanitary towel Demonstrate skills and knowledge in arranging fullness and mending clothes. Demonstrate skills in knitting and crochet ing.
goals: Demonstrate the ability to apply principles of Food and Nutrition.
Demonstrate the ability to apply principles of Home management.
Demonstrate the ability to apply principles of Health Education.
Demonstrate the abili ty to apply principles of needle work and Crafts.

subtopics: 7.3.2 Preparation of meal and flour mixtures
specific_outcomes: 7.3.1.1 Prepare flour mixtures using baking powder and yeast
7.3.1.2 use air and baking powder as raising agents in dishes
Identify parts of a kitchen sink and their functions.
7.5.1.3 Clean and care for different floor coverings
7.6.1.2 Explain the effect of colour in a room
7.6.1.3 Arrange decorations according to the background
7.7.1.1 Explain what a time plan is

subtopics: 7.8.1 Laundering, Starching and bluing white garments
specific_outcomes: 7.8.1.1 Launder, starch and blue white garments
7.8.1.2 Demonstrate how to make starch and blue
7.9.1.1 Maintain kitchen garden by practicing effective control of pests and diseases.
7.10.1.2 Explain the importance of the skin
7.10.1.3 Describe the functions of the skin
7.10.1.4 Explain how to care for the skin
7.11.1.4.Explain the required personal hygiene during menstruation
7.11.1.5.Identify the materials for making reusable/homemade sanitary towels
7.11.1.6 Outline ways of maintaining personal hygiene during puberty and menstruation
7.12.1.1 Identify ways of promoting privacy and bodily integrity for both boys and girls
7.13.1.1 Describe ways of arrangement of fullness
7.14.1.2 Describe tools and materials required in knitting
7.14.2.2 Describe tools and materials required in crocheting
7.15.1.1 Identify entrepreneurial opportunities in, Home Economics
